title: Verify and harden I6 delegation non-escalation enforcement
intent: I6 enforcement already exists in ValidationEngine (checkDelegationNonEscalation) but lacks property tests and documentation. For v0.1: verify the existing implementation is correct for the current single-agent-profile model, add property tests proving I6 holds, and ensure the design does not preclude per-agent C_eff(S, a_j) scoping in v0.2 when multi-agent orchestration is introduced.
acceptance_criteria: Property tests prove: delegated capability types not in enabled set are denied with I6_DELEGATION_ESCALATION
Property tests prove: delegated capability types in enabled set are permitted
Property tests prove: missing or malformed delegated_capabilities param passes (spawned agent's own actions validated at gate time)
Existing I6 check does not hardcode assumptions that would block per-agent capability scoping in v0.2
authority.ts I6 extension comment updated with v0.2 design notes for per-agent C_eff
Kernel boundary rule preserved — no new node:fs/node:net imports in kernel
